since_last: 53% of 101 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.92%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 53% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.19% · BTC +0.96% · Gold -0.02% · Nasdaq100 +0.04%. 53% of 101 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.92%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.92%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -0.54%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: AMBA is the standout at +6.71%
cards.body: Leaders: AMBA +6.71%, MDB +5.60%, BABA +4.90%, SMR +3.50%, TER +3.30%. Laggards: ORCL -3.83%, DELL -3.39%, SPCX -3.06%, KLAC -2.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -3.06% at $120.2
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -3.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
